description: Accounts. In Judaeo-Arabic and eastern Arabic numerals. Dated: 19 Sivan and 24 Av 5569 AM, which is 1809 CE. The heading mentions a "wikala" (commercial storehouse) in connection with the "requested" expenses (מטלוב). A variety of men and women are listed, such as: Yiṣḥaq Bibas, Yiṣḥaq Yaʿabeṣ, Umm Aṣlan, Anton al-Ḥarīrī, Nissīm al-Qara (the Qaraite?), Ḥayyīm Būnān, Shelomo Romano, Joya bt. Ashiyahu, Moshe ʿAkūbas, Muḥammad Ḥadād, Shimʿon Frances, and others.
description_he: רשימה או טבלה ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בJRL.
